examples: I had another imaginary friend, Violetta, and I loved her almost as well as I loved Katie Maurice.
Violetta is deeply moved and returns the affection.
The story begins with a party, where the Paris courtesan, Violetta Valery, already suffering from tuberculosis, meets a long-time admirer, Alfredo Germont for the first time.
The stars are soprano Patrizia Ciofi as Violetta and tenor Vittorio Grigolo as Alfredo, with conductor Myung-Whun Chung.
His carer, Violetta Aylward, an agency nurse working for the NHS, was filmed switching off her patient's life support machine.
